profile.bio: Hi 👋, welcome! Here you'll find all my links, projects, social media accounts, and ways to contact me

testimonials.name: Andrés Rojas Lopez
testimonials.description: I am happy with Alejandro's work; the project lasted two months and he was always available to answer questions

testimonials.name: Laura Jiménez P.
testimonials.description: What I liked most was the communication; he was attentive to details, met the deadlines, and the result was great

testimonials.name: Miguel Salazar S.
testimonials.description: We were looking for a solution to manage our real estate projects, and that is exactly what we got.

testimonials.name: Sofia Arango Uvita
testimonials.description: We migrated to a more modern platform without losing information. The whole process was very simple.

testimonials.name: Diego Antonio B.
testimonials.description: We were looking for a way to serve our clients even after hours. The chatbot turned out really well

company.title: Company
company.description: Learn more about our vision and services

cta.title: Ready to bring your idea to production?
cta.subtitle: Schedule a free 30-min video call and let's define the scope of your project together.
cta.whatsapp_message: Hello, Alejandro! 👋 I saw your profile and I am interested in developing a project. I would like to schedule a free 30-minute video call to talk about my idea and learn how we can work together.

wa_modal.title: Please complete the details
wa_modal.message_template:
Hello Alejandro. My name is {name} and I am writing to you from your website.

I am contacting you for the following reason: *{reason}*.

I would like to discuss this, please. Thank you very much!

redirect_modal.title: Redirect to WhatsApp
redirect_modal.message: Do you want to be redirected to WhatsApp to schedule your video call?
